# ts2moonbit-migration

> Migrate a TypeScript codebase to MoonBit on the `js` target while keeping the same JavaScript API contract, using mizchi/js (JS/Web/Node bindings), mizchi/x (cross-target async backend: process/fs/http/ws), and mizchi/npm_typed (npm bindings). Use when porting a TS library, Node service, npm package, or Cloudflare Worker to MoonBit and the existing JS/TS consumers, `.d.ts`, and tests must keep working unchanged.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/lang/ts2moonbit-migration
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/lang/ts2moonbit-migration
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add mizchi/skills --skill ts2moonbit-migration
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit mizchi/skills/lang/ts2moonbit-migration ~/.claude/skills/ts2moonbit-migration
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
